message.content:
Review PR #348 for compliance with code comments in modified files.

Use `gh pr diff 348` to get changes. Read the full files (not just diff) that were modified to see all code comments.

Check if the PR changes comply with:
- TODO comments
- FIXME comments  
- NOTE/WARNING comments
- JSDoc requirements
- Inline guidance comments

Return list of issues found with:
- File and line number
- Description
- Which comment was violated (quote it)
- Why it's relevant

Only report real violations, not suggestions.
